vocabulary.example_sentence: Save your money for something useful.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把钱存起来买有用的东西。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I get pocket money from my parents each week.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我每周从父母那里得到零花钱。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My schoolbag was too old, so I saved up for a new one.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的书包太旧了，所以我攒钱买了一个新的。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The shop sells many kinds of goods.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这家商店卖各种各样的商品。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I spent half my pocket money on a drink.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我花了一半零花钱买了一杯饮料。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The shop offers good service to its customers.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这家商店为顾客提供良好的服务。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A haircut costs twenty yuan at this barber shop.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在这家理发店理发要二十元。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I want to save up for a small microscope.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我想攒钱买一台小显微镜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I was lucky to find the book on sale.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我很幸运在打折时找到了那本书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She saved up for three months to buy a film ticket.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她攒了三个月的钱买了一张电影票。

vocabulary.example_sentence: There is a big sale at the bookshop today.
He used his pocket money to buy a film ticket.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他用零花钱买了一张电影票。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It is important to manage your money well.
It is difficult to choose when you do not have much money.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 钱不多的时候很难选择。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They sell drinks and snacks at the school fair.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们在学校集市上卖饮料和零食。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He keeps his pocket money in a glass jar.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他把零花钱放在一个玻璃罐里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I spent half of my money on a haircut.
I save for big things — for example, a microscope.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我为大件东西存钱——例如，一台显微镜。
